JavaScript event listeners and tests for app message functionality in a Pebble app.

## Folders
- **[js](js/README.md)**: JavaScript event listeners for Pebble app ready and appmessage events, with logging and message reply.

## Files
- **[app_message_test.c](app_message_test.c.md)**: Tests app message sending and receiving functionality with button click handlers in a Pebble app.
